01 — The Conviction

700 Million Men. Zero Clinics Built for Them.

He won't go to the doctor. He buys supplements off the internet at 2am. He pretends he's fine. 85% of Indian men avoid preventive care — not because they don't need it, but because the system was never built for them.

No Ayurvedic clinic chain has ever made men's health its reason for existing. Until PurshVeda.

400,000 men paid for a single Ayurvedic product. They weren't buying a supplement — they were asking for a clinic. PurshVeda is answering that call.

Founder Vishnu Datt Sharma spent 20 years building the infrastructure quietly — a USFDA-registered factory, 200+ formulations, 10+ countries. Now he's building the ecosystem those men always needed.

02 — The Problem

A Country That Leaves Men's Health Behind.

India's healthcare system was never designed around men's health. The stigma around seeking help, the absence of specialised clinics, and a fragmented approach to care have created a silent epidemic — affecting fertility, mental health, sexual health, and chronic disease outcomes for hundreds of millions of Indian men.

The Systemic Failures
Stigmatised category: Male health issues remain taboo — men silently suffer conditions that are entirely treatable with the right care.
No specialised clinics: <10% of facilities offer men's health services. Zero Ayurvedic clinic chains are exclusively men-focused.
Supplement overdependence: 60–70% of supplements are consumed without medical supervision even as the nutraceutical market grows at 40%+ CAGR.
Fragmented care: No integrated system combining Ayurveda, psychology, nutrition, and diagnostics. 70–75% of mental health goes untreated.
The PurshVeda Solution
Safe, dignified access: Clinics that prioritise men's Ayurvedic care — normalising treatment for fertility, vitality, and chronic conditions.
India's first men-focused Ayurvedic chain: A national franchise network delivering standardised, affordable, holistic clinical care built around men's health needs.
Medically supervised products: Proprietary formulations prescribed by qualified Ayurvedic doctors — not sold over-the-counter without guidance.
Integrated 4-step protocol: Ayurveda + Psychology + Diet & Lifestyle + Medical Astrology — a comprehensive, root-cause approach to men's health.
03 — The Clinic Concept

Four Disciplines. One Protocol. No One Else Offers It.

Every PurshVeda clinic runs the same 4-step treatment protocol — combining Ayurveda, Psychology, Diet & Lifestyle, and Medical Astrology into one integrated care system. No other clinic network in India offers this.

01
Nadi Pariksha
Dosha analysis, organ mapping, root cause detection
02
Psychology Counselling
Stress, habits, emotional & behavioural barriers
03
Diet & Lifestyle
Personalised food design, sleep & activity planning
04
Medical Astrology
Birth chart correlation — lifelong patterns & weaknesses
PurshVeda Ultra Power Gummies — Ayurvedic Prash for Men with Shilajit, Safed Musli & 20+ Herbs

Conditions treated include infertility and low sperm count, erectile dysfunction, prostate disorders (BPH and prostatitis), performance anxiety and stress, hypertension, joint pain and arthritis, kidney disorders, liver conditions, diabetes management, and cancer screening support.

04 — The Origin Story

How a Single Product Became a Platform.

The story of PurshVeda begins with Vajayu Prash — India's only Ayurvedic Prash specifically formulated for men's health. What started as a single product line became the most powerful market signal Vishnu Datt Sharma could have received.

Deep Ayurveda Revenue History
FY 2022–23: ₹2.5 Crore baseline revenue from men's range launch
FY 2023–24: ₹9.47 Crore — a 279% year-on-year growth driven by Vajayu Prash
FY 2024–25: ₹10 Crore — the pivot year, transitioning from products to clinics
400,000+ male customers globally, with proven repeat purchase behaviour
The Insight That Built PurshVeda
Men weren't just buying a product — they were seeking a complete health system. The product was a signal of unmet clinical demand.
India's fastest-growing wellness category at 22% CAGR, with Ayurveda adoption accelerating post-pandemic.
The bridge: Transition from Men's Products → Men's Clinics → Men's Health Ecosystem.
Day 1 supply certainty: Deep Ayurveda's manufacturing unit supplies all clinic products from launch — zero supply chain risk.
Deep Ayurveda's 200+ Product Range — Ready from Day 1 for Every PurshVeda Clinic

"Vajayu Prash's success didn't just validate a product — it validated a category. 400,000 men paying for Ayurvedic men's health products told us: build them a clinic."

05 — Competitive Advantage

A Category Creator With No Direct Competitors.

India's healthcare landscape has four distinct quadrants: allopathic-general (Apollo, Fortis, Max), allopathic-men (IASH India, Meddo), Ayurvedic-general (Jiva Ayurveda, Dr. Batra's, Kerala Ayurveda), and Ayurvedic-men. Only PurshVeda is an Ayurvedic chain that prioritises men's health as its core mission.

Every competitor either treats men as one segment among many, or relies on chemical and allopathic approaches. PurshVeda's positioning as India's first Ayurvedic chain that centres men's health isn't a marketing claim — it's a structural moat.

🏆
First-Mover in a Vacant Quadrant
India's first Ayurvedic clinic chain that makes men's health the primary focus — securing a distinct first-mover advantage with no direct competition in this specific intersection.
🔬
20 Years of Manufacturing Moat
Backed by Deep Ayurveda's GMP-certified, USFDA-registered facility with 400+ formulations — a supply chain and IP advantage competitors cannot replicate overnight.
🔁
Built-In Recurring Revenue
Own-label product range with 15+ OTC men's products and an in-house pharmacy — every clinic visit drives product prescription and repeat D2C revenue.
📱
Tech-Enabled Franchise Control
Proprietary EMR system, patient mobile app, clinic management software, and royalty reporting — preventing quality dilution as the network scales to 960 locations.
⚡
Capital-Efficient Growth Engine
Franchisees fund clinic setup (₹25–30 Lakhs each), while PurshVeda earns franchise fees, monthly royalty, and product margins — minimal capital burn per location.
📊
Data Moat at Scale
Building India's largest dataset of Ayurvedic men's health outcomes — a proprietary intelligence layer that compounds in value with every clinic and every patient.
06 — Business Model

Six Revenue Streams. Low CAPEX. High Scalability.

PurshVeda's business model is one of its strongest assets. Unlike capital-intensive hospital chains that require enormous upfront investment per location, PurshVeda's franchise architecture means franchisees fund the setup while PurshVeda captures the recurring revenue.

01
Clinic Consultation Fees
Doctor consultation revenue from patients across the clinic network — the primary patient entry point for all downstream revenue.
02
Ayurvedic Pharmacy
Prescription-based dispensing of proprietary Deep Ayurveda formulations — 20% margin to PurshVeda on every pharmacy purchase.
03
OTC / Retail Products
Over-the-counter men's health products sold at clinic — 40% margin to PurshVeda. Includes Vajayu Prash and 15+ branded SKUs.
04
Lab & Diagnostics
In-clinic and partner lab diagnostic services — creating a complete care pathway and additional revenue from every patient visit.
05
Franchise Fee & Royalty
One-time onboarding fee of ₹5–8 Lakhs per franchise plus 12–15% monthly royalty on gross revenue — the core recurring income at scale.
06
D2C / Repeat Purchases
Digital reorders and subscription purchases through the patient app and e-commerce — extending LTV well beyond the clinic visit.

Per clinic unit economics: estimated monthly revenue of ₹8 Lakhs with a franchisee EBITDA margin of approximately 35% and a payback period of 18–24 months. PurshVeda earns royalty and product revenue from every clinic — without bearing setup risk.

₹95,000 Cr Market. No Organised Men's Ayurveda Player.

39,000 registered Ayurvedic clinics. 120,000 unregistered practitioners. Zero standardised men's health chains. That is PurshVeda's opening.

08 — Traction

De-Risking the Investment With Evidence.

PurshVeda is not a concept. It is a business built on two decades of demonstrated capability — with the product traction, manufacturing infrastructure, regulatory compliance, and early franchise demand to validate the investment thesis before capital is deployed.

  • 400,000+ global male customers served through Vajayu Prash Ayurvedic Men Health Range through Deep Ayurveda's men's health range — with proven repeat purchase behaviour that validates clinic-based demand.
  • ₹9.47 Crore in FY24 men's range revenue, growing 279% year-on-year — with ₹10 Crore in FY25 as the pivot year into the clinic model.
  • 7 years of dedicated R&D generating 400+ clinically tested formulations, with GMP-certified manufacturing and international exports to 10+ countries.
  • 10+ committed franchisees indicated by signed LOIs and franchise agreements — demonstrating grassroots demand for the model before seed capital is raised.
  • 2 clinics already operational in Phase 1 (North India), with 10 more targeted this quarter — real-world proof of the clinic protocol, unit economics, and franchise demand. PurshVeda is building live, not pitching a concept.
  • Proprietary tech stack already built — EMR system, clinic management software, and patient mobile app ready for deployment across the franchise network.
09 — The Founder

A Builder With 20 Years of Skin in the Game.

Vhelp Capital backs founders, not just ideas. Vishnu Datt Sharma is one of the most operationally credentialed founders we have evaluated in the health and wellness space — with two decades of demonstrated execution in a sector that punishes shortcuts.

VDS
Vishnu Datt Sharma
Founder · PurshVeda & Deep Ayurveda
20+ years in Ayurvedic product development and manufacturing. Founded Deep Ayurveda, scaled men's health range to ₹10 Cr+. Built a USFDA-registered, GMP-certified manufacturing unit and pioneered Vajayu Prash — serving 400,000+ male customers globally. Vision: make PurshVeda the MedPlus of Ayurvedic men's healthcare.
DEEP
Deep Ayurveda
Manufacturing & R&D Parent Entity
8,000 sq ft GMP-certified unit in Mohali. AYUSH & FSSAI Central Licence. USFDA Registered Facility. 200+ proprietary formulations. 10+ country distribution. The manufacturing backbone that de-risks PurshVeda's entire product supply chain from Day 1.

The founding entity brings something few early-stage startups can claim: a fully operational, compliant, export-ready manufacturing facility that already produces the products PurshVeda's clinics will prescribe. The supply chain risk that kills most healthcare startups is already solved.

12 — The Ask

₹20 Crore to Build the Infrastructure India's Men Deserve.

PurshVeda is raising a Seed round of ₹20 Crore at a pre-money valuation of ₹120 Crore, offering a 16.54% equity stake. The capital will be deployed across marketing and brand awareness (30%), inventory and manufacturing scale-up (30%), clinic infrastructure and manpower (20%), IT and technology platform (10%), and working capital (10%).

Seed Round Ask
₹20 Cr
Equity on offer: 16.54% · Pre-money valuation: ₹120 Crore

How the ₹20 Cr seed round is deployed:

30% — Marketing & Branding
30% — Inventory & Manufacturing
20% — Clinic Infra & Manpower
10% — IT, EMR & App
10% — Working Capital
13 — The Vision

What India Looks Like If PurshVeda Wins.

Five years from now —

01
A young professional in Delhi notices early signs of fatigue and declining vitality. Instead of self-medicating with an internet-bought supplement, he books an appointment at his nearest PurshVeda clinic — walks in, gets a Nadi Pariksha, leaves with a personalised treatment plan. The stigma around men's health begins to dissolve, one clinic visit at a time.
02
A couple in Chandigarh struggling with infertility discover that male factor infertility — driving nearly half of all infertility cases — is now addressable through a specialised, evidence-backed Ayurvedic protocol available at 960 clinics nationwide. Male health is finally treated with the seriousness it deserves.
03
India's Ayurveda sector — fragmented across 120,000 unregistered practitioners with no standardisation — has a national category leader built by PurshVeda: standardised protocols, consistent clinical outcomes, and tech-enabled quality control across every franchise location in every district.
04
The statistic that 85% of Indian men skip preventive health checkups begins to shift — because for the first time, there is a clinic designed for them, affordable for them, and culturally aligned with the Ayurvedic tradition they already trust.

This is the Transforming Men's Health vision — and PurshVeda, founded by Vishnu Datt Sharma and backed by 20 years of Deep Ayurveda's manufacturing legacy, is the company with the infrastructure, the traction, and the founder conviction to make it real.
